reviews.comment: Guys I had the their house blend cappuccino which is supposed to be the Indian Arabic nd robusta blend but let me tell u they not even close to brands who serve the same blend  like stand by coffee ,Javaphile in bandra or for that matter Third wave in the same price range in the same mall..I just had a sip nd left the table, its very similar to Starbucks which we all know is just a brand nd no quality

reviewReply.comment:
Hi Sajit,
We appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts. Our House Blend is crafted using 100% Arabica beans, while our Volcano Blend brings together Arabica and Robusta for a stronger profile. We understand every coffee lover has a unique palate, and your feedback helps us continue refining the experience.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi Ajay,
